{% extends "marketing/base.html" %} {% load marketing_format %} {% block title %}{{ vendor.name }}{% endblock %} {% block page_title %}{{ vendor.name }}{% endblock %} {% block page_subtitle %}{% t "Vendor invoices, contracts, and spend breakdown" %}{% endblock %} {% block page_actions %} {% t "All vendors" %} {% endblock %} {% block content %}
{% t "Invoice total" %}
{{ total_spend|money }}
{% t "Action cost" %}
{{ total_action|money }}
{% t "Tax" %}
{{ total_tax|money }}
{% t "Paid amount" %}
{{ total_paid|money }}

{% t "Invoices" %} ({{ invoice_count }})

{% for invoice in invoices %} {% empty %} {% endfor %}
{% t "Number" %} {% t "Date" %} {% t "Invoice total" %} {% t "Paid amount" %} {% t "Stage" %}
{{ invoice.invoice_number }} {% display_date invoice.invoice_date %} {{ invoice.amount|money }} {{ invoice.paid_amount|default:invoice.amount|money }} {% t invoice.payment_stage|stage_label %}
{% t "No invoices to display." %}
{% if contracts %}

{% t "Contracts" %}

{% for contract in contracts %} {% endfor %}
{% t "Title" %} {% t "Stage" %} {% t "Start date" %} {% t "End date" %} {% t "Amount (ceiling)" %}
{{ contract.title }} {% t contract.stage %} {% display_date contract.start_date %} {% display_date contract.end_date %} {% if contract.amount %}{{ contract.amount|money }}{% else %}—{% endif %}
{% endif %} {% endblock %}
